title: NBA Playoff Pulse: May 9, 2026
subtitle: Conference Semifinals Heat Up, Stars Deliver Big Performances

items.headline: Knicks on Brink of Conference Finals, Lead 76ers 3-0
items.summary: The New York Knicks are one win away from advancing to the Eastern Conference Finals after Jalen Brunson's 33-point outburst led them to a decisive Game 3 victory over the Philadelphia 76ers. New York now holds a commanding 3-0 series lead.

items.headline: Wembanyama's 39-Point Masterpiece Gives Spurs 2-1 Series Lead
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama delivered a monstrous performance with 39 points, 15 rebounds, and 5 blocks, guiding the San Antonio Spurs to a crucial Game 3 win and a 2-1 series advantage against the Minnesota Timberwolves.

items.headline: Anunoby Questionable, Embiid Returns in Playoff Action
items.summary: Knicks forward OG Anunoby is day-to-day with a strained right hamstring, missing Game 3. Meanwhile, Joel Embiid returned for the 76ers in Game 3 after a sprained ankle and hip soreness, scoring 18 points. Jalen Williams of the Thunder was ruled out for Game 2 vs. Lakers due to a hamstring injury. Anthony Edwards of the Timberwolves was questionable with a knee injury before Game 3.

items.headline: Knicks Dominate 76ers in Game 3
items.summary: Jalen Brunson's 33 points spearheaded the Knicks to a decisive road win over the 76ers, taking a commanding 3-0 series lead.

items.headline: Spurs Take Game 3 Behind Wembanyama's Heroics
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama put up a historic 39 points, 15 rebounds, and 5 blocks as the Spurs edged the Timberwolves to go up 2-1.

items.headline: Thunder Extend Series Lead Over Lakers
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder maintained their perfect playoff record, defeating the Lakers to take a 2-0 series lead. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Chet Holmgren each contributed 22 points.

items.headline: Pistons Hold Off Cavaliers for 2-0 Lead
items.summary: The Detroit Pistons secured their second straight win over the Cavaliers, now leading their series 2-0. Donovan Mitchell had 31 points for Cleveland in a losing effort.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama's Historic Night
items.statContext: Joins Kareem, Hakeem, Shaq as only players with 35+ PTS, 15+ REB, 5+ BLK in a playoff game.

items.headline: Jalen Brunson Carries Knicks Offense
items.statContext: Led NYK to a 3-0 series lead over PHI.

items.headline: Anthony Edwards' Double-Double Effort
items.statContext: Edwards fought hard in Game 3 against the Spurs.

items.headline: Deni Avdija's All-Star Breakout Season
items.statContext: Avdija earned his first All-Star selection, establishing himself as a key figure for Portland. He recorded 22 points, 3 rebounds, and 3 assists in a first-round Game 5 loss.

items.headline: Cade Cunningham's Playoff Consistency
items.statContext: Cunningham is the 4th player in NBA history to score 20+ points in each of his first 15 career playoff games, alongside Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, LeBron James, and Anthony Davis.

items.headline: Thunder's Star Duo Leads the Way
items.statContext: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Chet Holmgren both delivered 22 points to help OKC take a 2-0 series lead against the Lakers.

items.headline: Cavs vs. Pistons - Game 3
items.summary: The Cavaliers look to get back into the series at home against the Pistons, who lead 2-0.

items.headline: Thunder vs. Lakers - Game 3
items.summary: The Lakers aim to avoid a 3-0 deficit as they host the undefeated Thunder in Game 3.

items.headline: NBA Draft Lottery Set for Tomorrow
items.summary: The highly anticipated 2026 NBA Draft Lottery is scheduled for May 10th, with teams eager to secure a top pick.

items.headline: Conference Finals and NBA Finals Dates Confirmed
items.summary: The Eastern Conference Finals are slated to begin on May 19th, followed by the Western Conference Finals on May 20th. Game 1 of the 2026 NBA Finals is scheduled for June 3rd.

items.headline: Blazers Eyeing Shooters to Complement All-Star Deni Avdija
items.summary: Following Deni Avdija's breakout All-Star campaign and the Blazers' first-round playoff exit, Portland is reportedly focused on acquiring more reliable shooters to space the floor around their cornerstone player. Speculation includes potential pursuits of major talents like Giannis Antetokounmpo or a reunion with Damian Lillard.
